values: PageShot — a Sitecore Marketplace custom app exposing a Page Builder Context Panel that captures a clean chrome-free screenshot of the page the editor is currently viewing in SitecoreAI Pages, via Agent API GET /api/v1/pages/{pageId}/screenshot, with copy-to-clipboard and download-PNG actions. Concept captured in conversation; no brain-dump file.

notes: PRD-000 is the holistic/greenfield PRD for the whole PageShot app (single-PRD product).
Critical review completed: stakeholder answered Round 1 and signalled proceed without Round 2 (goals reframed as outcomes; other critiques accepted as dogfood-context trade-offs).
ADR-0002 locks client-side iframe + server-proxy architecture; ADR-0003 locks no-local-HTTPS + Vercel-preview integration surface.
Tenant selection for custom-app registration deferred to scaffold time (stakeholder has credentials ready).
planning_track: minimal (architecture blueprint file omitted; ADRs capture decisions from PRD)
architecture decisions recorded: ADR-0002 (iframe+proxy), ADR-0003 (no local HTTPS), ADR-0004 (Next.js+Node), ADR-0005 (custom app), ADR-0006 (stateless)
